name: Lou Carter
abstract: Louis Carter (September 15, 1918 – September 25, 2005) was an American jazz pianist, composer, and songwriter. He had a long yet low-profile career.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: Herbie and Lou Carter was playing piano and they ended up writing all those songs like, “I Told You I Love You, Now Get Out,”, “Detour Ahead,”
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
